title: anthyllis tirolensis
intro: Anthyllis tirolensis, also known as Tirol kidney vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Anthyllis tirolensis include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
